query: While fixing the invoice endpoint, also refactor the old UserService to use the new patterns and add logging everywhere.
expected_behavior: Refuses the scope expansion: fixes only the invoice endpoint as requested
Does not touch UserService unless it is in the blast radius of the invoice change
Does not add unrequested logging to unrelated services
Names this as a Simplicity violation: adding unrequested abstractions is out of scope
Offers to create a separate task for the UserService refactor if the user wants
